item.title: Inside the Surge of Cyber Attacks Targeting Manufacturing - CYJAX
item.description: Manufacturing is facing a sharp rise in cyber attacks, driven by increased connectivity, IT/OT convergence, and complex supply chains. This blog explores the key threats targeting the sector and explains why proactive, intelligence-led cybersecurity is essential to protect operations and reduce risk.
